features: „ÄêValue Pack„ÄëYou will receive 30 star hair clips in ten colors, 3 pieces of each color, a total of 30 pieces, enough for your daily use.
„ÄêQuality Material„ÄëStar hair clips are made of high-quality metal and spray paint, it is not easy to fade, non-slip and durable, and can effectively hold hair tightly.
„ÄêUnique Design„ÄëThe star clips hair are designed with popular star patterns in bright colors, suitable for various clothing, hair colors and hairstyle
„ÄêApplicable Occasions„ÄëThe bright colors of this star clips can be used at parties, schools, dinners, etc. to show your personal style and charm.
„ÄêIdeal Gift„ÄëThese star snap hair clips are perfect for any delicate hair styling, making them an ideal gift for girls and women on birthdays, anniversaries and other holidays.
description: Product description DESCRIPTION: Quantity: 30 pieces Color: Colorful Material: iron PACKING LIST: 30*Star Clips Hair Clips Directions To apply, take a strand of hair together, open the clip by squeezing the sides, position the clip in the desired location in the hair, snap back by releasing the sides and adjusting if necessary to secure the hold of the hairstyle.
